items.why: Named predicates that mention your goal's state (lookup_symbol for each definition): make_lbad1, inv_lbad1, inv_lbad1_i. No mechanical `={glob}` frame applies at this call — build the call invariant from THIS development's own in-scope predicates (an invariant conjunct can be a guarded implication / size-or-count bound / domain fact, not only an equality).
